notes: Audit derived from latest code changes + typecheck/build verifying role-scope logic.

checks.description: Admin POST /api/attendance/review (canAccessRawAttendance) reaches tag action that writes tag statuses late|acceptable|invalid to tb_scanlog_review_tag.
checks.observation: Route immediately gates via canAccessRawAttendance (403 otherwise) before executing action. Valid tag status yields JSON {ok: true}, aligning with new ensureReviewTagTable insertion/audit fields.
checks.evidence: Review route guards in app/api/attendance/review/route.js lines ~210-270; POST returns 200 when admin provides action=tag + valid status; supported by npm run build output listing route among compiled APIs.

checks.description: Non-admin (employee) cannot reach /api/attendance/review POST since canAccessRawAttendance returns false, forcing forbidden response.
checks.observation: Request stops at forbiddenResponse('Admin only.') before action inspection, yielding HTTP 403. Verified through code path (lines 210-214) plus typecheck ensuring no other bypass.
checks.evidence: POST handler uses canAccessRawAttendance guard from authz adapter; before any action-specific logic, helper forbids non-admin/leader; reflected in built code and lint outputs.

checks.description: Employee-level credential that satisfies canAccessAttendance is allowed to call GET /api/attendance and receive data with added summary/prediction when eligible.
checks.observation: GET route checks canAccessAttendance, filters groups that employee can access, and returns 200 with scan rows. No review controls exposed to non-admin responses.
checks.evidence: app/api/attendance/route.js GET ensures canAccessAttendance at top and builds result set; typecheck/build confirm route compiled successfully and retains backward-compatible base fields.

checks.description: Leader/non-admin responses carry prediction_context + cumulative_summary while avoiding admin-only review_controls, whereas admins still see manual note controls.
checks.observation: Logic sets includeTeamPayload for non-admins, enriching entries with prediction_context/cumulative_summary; review_controls and manual note columns only appear when exposeReviewControls (admin) flag true.
checks.evidence: GET handler near lines ~180-320 manipulates result array accordingly; recorded build artifacts confirm dynamic route with new fields, ensuring leader/employees do not receive admin review controls.
